description_long: This is a bright yellow, foldable caution sign commonly used to warn pedestrians of wet or slippery floors. The sign features a prominent triangular warning symbol with a red icon of a person slipping, accompanied by the bold text 'CAUTION! WET FLOOR' in black. The sign is constructed from lightweight, durable plastic and has a built-in handle at the top for easy carrying and placement. Its A-frame design allows it to stand freely on flat surfaces, with two wide panels connected at the top and splayed at the base for stability. The surface is slightly textured to reduce glare and enhance visibility, while the base has ridged details for added grip. This type of sign is typically used in public spaces such as malls, office buildings, and sidewalks to alert passersby to temporary hazards.
description: A bright yellow, foldable plastic caution sign with a 'CAUTION! WET FLOOR' warning and a slipping person icon, designed for high visibility and easy placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the warning text, slipping person icon, and handle cutout at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, A-frame profile and the hinge at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same warning text and icon visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin, splayed A-frame structure.
